items.name: Claude Advisor tool
items.tagline: Pair Opus as advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as executor
items.description: Pair Opus as an advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as an executor via the Messages API, for developers building AI agents.

items.name: Integrations in Spine
items.tagline: AI that synthesize and researches info across multiple apps
items.description: The AI research that beats Perplexity, Claude, ChatGPT, now connected to your apps and running on a schedule. Describe a project, Spine's agents pull from your tools, browse the web, and deliver finished work. Reports, docs, spreadsheets, presentations. Set it to run daily or weekly. Results land in Notion, Google Docs, Sheets, wherever you work.

items.name: Google Finance
items.tagline: Ask complex finance questions, get AI-grounded answers
items.description: Google Finance now combines AI Deep Search, live earnings transcripts, advanced charting, and prediction market data into a single free tool for investors and market researchers globally.

items.name: Drift
items.tagline: Minimalist journal app that fades over time
items.description: Drift is a journal app for people who want less. 120 characters. A drawing and a photo. That's it. No streaks, no AI, no ads. Everything you write naturally softens over time. Text loses clarity. Drawings dissolve. Photos grow faint. Touch and hold to bring any entry back. Nothing is deleted — just quieter. Anchors is an anonymous shared space. A prompt appears periodically. Strangers respond side by side. No profiles, no followers.

items.name: SoulLink
items.description: 𝐒𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐤 lets you build a cozy life with an awesome 3D AI character during the breaks of vibe coding. It is the next-gen companion app built for co-presence with best-in-class 3D visuals, novel-depth lore, emotional continuity, proactivity and long-term memory.

items.name: Manus Skills
items.tagline: Package Manus workflows into reusable agent Skills
items.description: Save your best Manus workflows as reusable Skills, trigger them with /SKILL_NAME, and share across your team. Built for Manus users who run recurring or multi-step agent tasks at work.

items.name: Minty
items.tagline: AI companion for building a clear career path
items.description: Minty is your AI companion for planning your career and turning it into a clear roadmap. It builds an interactive flow graph you can edit like a Miro board, simple, visual, and flexible. Big Tech, startups, content creation, whatever your path is, Minty adapts to you.

items.name: Perplexity Finance
items.tagline: See your full financial life, bank to brokerage in one place
items.description: Perplexity Finance now connects your bank accounts, credit cards, and loans via Plaid; alongside your brokerage accounts. Track spending, build custom budget tools, and visualize your full net worth in one place. No setup headaches!

items.name: MiniMax CLI
items.tagline: Give your AI agents native multimodal capabilities
items.description: MMX-CLI is MiniMax’s official CLI for AI agents and terminals. It exposes text, image, video, speech, music, vision, and search through one command surface, with agent-oriented design like clean stdout, semantic exit codes, async jobs, and seamless Token Plan integration.

items.name: Knock data sources
items.tagline: Trigger event-based messaging from Stripe, Clerk, Supabase
items.description: Knock data sources enable you to ingest event data from any tool to trigger messaging in a few clicks—no code required. Connect pre-built sources like Stripe, Clerk, Supabase, PostHog, and WorkOS, or map any custom webhook to workflows, audiences, and user updates in a few clicks. Knock handles verification, transformation, and action mapping so you can launch lifecycle and transactional messaging faster.
